channel.title: Download-Manager on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Download-Manager on Pi Stack

item.title: pyLoad vs Aria2 vs JDownloader: Best Self-Hosted Download Manager 2026
item.description:
Why Self-Host a Download Manager?

Running a download manager on your own server — whether a homelab, VPS, or NAS — gives you capabilities that desktop downloaders simply can’t match:
